title: Tortilla refrita
body:
Mod collection for fun. Based off Tortilla Land.

Minecraft. 1.20.1

Welcome to the ultimate guide for basic mods for Minecraft 1.20.1! Whether you're a seasoned player or just starting your Minecraft journey, this page is your one-stop destination for enhancing your gaming experience. Explore a handpicked selection of essential mods that will add exciting new features and mechanics to your favorite block-building adventure.

Better Inventory Management: Tired of juggling items in your inventory? This mod introduces smart sorting and categorization to keep your items organized. Say goodbye to messy chests and find what you need with ease!

Crafting Expansion: Unlock new crafting recipes and possibilities with this mod. From handy tools to decorative blocks, you'll discover a wide array of additional crafting options to unleash your creativity.

New Biomes and Structures: Explore uncharted territories with this mod's addition of unique biomes and fascinating structures. Uncover hidden treasures and encounter exciting challenges in new, never-before-seen environments.

Time-Saving Utilities: Time is precious, and this mod understands that. Discover a range of time-saving utilities like auto-harvesters, automatic crafting stations, and more, allowing you to focus on what you love most – building and exploring.

Remember to install mods responsibly and always check for compatibility with your Minecraft version. Enjoy exploring these basic mods for Minecraft 1.20.1, and let your creativity run wild as you dive into a world of endless possibilities! Happy crafting and adventuring!

This mod pack contains the following mods:
